posts.author: MurilloMorais (Murillo Morais)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

As a project manager, I want to visualize all project summaries. The overview widget is very interesting, but the status is set by Monday, and they themselves can’t accurately determine when the status changes to “at risk” or “late.”

I’d like to be able to create logic to define the status, for example: if less than 10% of activities are late, then “at risk,” or more than 10%, then “late.”

I believe this way the widget will come to life and be useful to many users.
My colleagues and I from other companies want to use this widget, but we can’t because it defines the project status without clear criteria, which makes it unusable.

What are you trying to achieve

My goal is to be able to set the status criteria for the “Overview” widget
